# Raj Kumar Sunar - Data Analyst Portfolio

## About
Raj Kumar Sunar is a Data Analyst based in West Sussex, UK, specializing in Python, SQL, Power BI, and Tableau.

## Skills
- Data Analysis
- Data Visualization (Power BI, Tableau)
- Python, SQL
- Machine Learning
